metadata.description: Graph of Skills — a single-plugin marketplace exposing the GoS retrieval system (MCP server, slash commands, retrieval agent, lifecycle hooks) for any skill library you bring.

plugins.name: graph-of-skills
plugins.description: Graph of Skills (GoS) — dependency-aware structural retrieval for massive skill libraries. Bundles the GoS MCP server, skills, slash commands, retrieval agent, and session-start hooks so Claude Code can discover, index, and traverse skill graphs without manual wiring. Bring your own SKILL.md library; run /gos-index once, then /gos-retrieve forever.
